original_prompt: Refactor AppointmentDetailView into a hybrid desktop/mobile interface with integrated drag-and-drop and barcode scanning functionality using html5-qrcode.
rephrased_goal: Transform view.appointment_detail.js into a responsive, hardware-accelerated interface that supports both manual drag-and-drop and optical scanning for hardware fulfillment.

subtasks_required: 1.1 View current file content to ensure no critical custom logic is lost
tasks.analogy_reference: inspecting old cave painting before overpaint

subtasks_required: 2.1 Verify new code handles existing database path assumptions (metadata.hardware, etc.)
tasks.analogy_reference: checking if new spear fits old hand

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Overwrite view.appointment_detail.js with Hybrid Code
subtasks_required: 3.1 Apply full file replace with provided hybrid logic
tasks.testing_criteria: File content matches provided code block.

tasks.analogy_reference: squinting at wall to find cracks

subtasks_required: Verify router link for #appointment/:id is still correct in main.js
Update wiki with hybrid view facts
